dataList.dlg:
I will take you to hell. If that's what it takes to burn and cut through the Nursefathers... Then yes, I will gladly become a bottomless pit for you to cast down every ugly secret you would rather forget and never see surfaced again.
So come. There in its depths... await all of me from every path, waiting with our blades drawn to cut down all of you.

Was I born here and raised by your hands, or am I merely a product of entanglement that was born from and nurtured by itself?
To me, it is a distinction without a difference. In my world, the dawn crows and eventide glows in the same heartbeat... Even the waves of sunlight and time slip by without touching me.

This house, so vast yet so narrow at the same time, offers everything needed to sustain a life. Hearty food to fill my belly every meal, pillows and bedding soft enough to enjoy a nap, and even amusements fit for pastimes.
But that's where it stops. That's all there is. Not a single thing... worth leaving my heart behind for.

In these vile, revolting moments, I am again and again dragged before sights I wish I'd never have to recall. What would it have been like, I wonder, if I was spared such torture when I close my eyes and beg for sleep?
If only that'd been the case... then perhaps I would never have grown to abhor the inescapable promise of nightfall.

I've thought of leaving, once. Wanted to tear myself free from the House of Spiders, even if it meant I'd be doomed to wander aimlessly through the endless Corridors. But in the end, all the freedom in the world won't give me the happiness and liberation I crave.
Not so long as I escaped the House with the Nursefathers still alive and kicking.

I banged and banged on that door more times than I could count, trapped between moments that came entangling in all their horrendousness... until an awful realization dawned on me—that while I was the only one who could open the Time Vault, there was nothing stopping any Nursefather of the House of Spiders from keeping it locked.
Even my intuition and perspective in sensing the flow of time gave me no reprieve. In the end... I became helplessly entangled beyond any hope of undoing the threads.

I am... waiting still, even now. In this place no one can escape from—a place ever suspended, ever barred from touching the sky... Waiting for the day when I will slash and scorch through the Nursefathers until they are severed away. How I yearn for that moment.

I'm the only one who always deserved to cry. Not a single day passed that I didn't want to weep from the moment I first learned what the Nursefathers wanted from me.
And that's why... none of you are allowed to shed even a single drop of tear! Not from sorrow, not from joy, not for any reason at all! You have no right... to cry.

If emotion is the only thing that remains, and the memory itself no longer exists... Could I finally lay down this hatred? No, that is impossible. Not when every thread that has entangled with my world is shaking with the intent to kill. And so nothing must be allowed to remain here. Not memory, not time, not even the heart to hold them. That is the ending you, who have made me into who I am, and I, will meet.
Ла... Лара... Лала... Лара...

I will cut down every one of you across every world... Scrape every last trace of you out of reality...
And then, I alone will hold all that has been severed... It's nothing more than a return to a state of Arayashiki.
I cannot be free from here. Not without severing the spider's thread...
I will cut down every one of them. The Nursefathers, the House of Spiders, all that has been and all that will be.
... This ticking, too, will break away in the end.
As painted.
The more I cut...
Not now... I don't want to return yet...
... Does resentment dull, too?
Even in death... It still won't be severed...
This is hardly a challenge compared to the homework I've done so far.
*puff* "SMH," was it.

Isn't it only fair that you Nursefathers despair just as much as I have resented? Let us forget all. Erase all. I will forget and erase myself, and you too, will be forgotten—ripped out from the world until not even a trace of you remains.

It's... not... over yet. Soon... soon, I'll become the bottomless well just like you wished in your deepest desires—the abyss where everything and anything can be ground beyond the veil of oblivion. And when I do, you'll be the first in line to be cast into me, all of you in the House of Spiders... Yes, you, the rejects of your own homes... Your own families want nothing more than to forget about you... Haha... Hahaha...
